entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH, BECOMING SOUTHWEST AROUND 5 MPH AFTER MIDNIGHT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS AROUND 70
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
LOWS AROUND 70
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING, THEN SHOWERS WITH THUNDERSTORMS LIKELY IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLEAR
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
